title: Sick-Day Spicy Tenders Peppers Stir-fry
description: A spicy Argentine-style dish featuring tender peppers and a touch of demerara sugar to soothe the sickness, perfect for sick-day meals.
instructions: Chop the bell peppers and onions into thin strips. Peel and finely chop the garlic cloves.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the chopped peppers, onions, and garlic. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes until they start to soften.
Add red chili flakes and demerara sugar to the pan. Stir well to distribute evenly across all ingredients. Cook for another minute until it becomes fragrant.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Mix gently and serve hot as a snack or light meal.
Adjust cooking time based on preference; stir-frying should be quick for best texture.
